title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
* Cash withdrawal limit of Rs. 1 lakh and purchase limit at Point of Sale (POS) of Rs. 2 lakh in a day.
  * 2 loyalty points for every Rs. 100 spent at merchant establishments
  * 2 Free visits per calendar quarter at participating Airport lounges in India.


IDBI BANK Platinum card offers 2 free visits per calendar quarter at participating Airport Lounges in India. For List of participating lounges please visit 
Cash withdrawal limit of Rs. 1 lakh and purchase limit at Point of Sale (POS) of Rs. 2 lakh in a day. 
The customer stands to earn 2 loyalty points for every Rs. 100 spent using the Platinum Debit Card for purchases at merchant establishments. 
_#Loyalty point reward structure as well as reward of loyalty points for different merchant categories is subject to revision from time to time._
In addition to insurance cover for lost cards, you also get personal accident cover, cover on loss of checked-in baggage, purchase protection, fire and burglary for household content. 
  * Fire and Burglary for House Hold Contents - Rs. 50,000 

_*Effective 1st July 2013, for Insurance claims to be accepted and processed; there should be a minimum of 2 purchase transactions using the Debit Card in last 3 months prior to the event date._
IDBI Bank regularly comes up with attractive offers and discounts at various merchant establishments through which Platinum Debit Card customers can avail fabulous offers on the Card usage.   
*Fee depends upon SOF of Scheme code of account under which account is opened.
As VISA Platinum PayWave Debit Card are issued on the basis of account opening form, if you have not opted for card while opening the account and would like to avail the same, for further details
Call on our Phone Banking numbers - Toll Free - (24x7 service)

metadata.description: Privileges knock your door with the IDBI Bank Platinum Debit Card, from enhanced limit on ATM withdrawals to upto Rs. 1 lakh to shopping for upto Rs. 2 lakh a day.
